videos.headline: Bryson Daily breaks the plane for an Army TD
videos.description: Bryson Daily keeps it himself and finds pay dirt to put Army on the board.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bryson Daily breaks the plane for an Army TD) 2024/12/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: Hayden Reed muscles through the line for an Army  TD
videos.description: Hayden Reed won't be denied as he breaks multiple tackles on his way to an Army touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Hayden Reed muscles through the line for an Army rushing TD) 2024/12/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: Bryson Daily walks in for his 2nd rushing TD for Army
videos.description: Bryson Daily finds pay dirt for a second time on the ground to pad Army's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bryson Daily walks in for his 2nd rushing TD for Army) 2024/12/29 ESHEET
